title: Cinematic Hairstyle Editorial Poster AI
sourceTitle: Cinematic Hairstyle Editorial Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Ultra-luxury cinematic hairstyle editorial poster, high-end couture beauty magazine aesthetic. The main title must read exactly "HAIR ATLAS", displayed large, clear, visually dominant, like a luxury magazine masthead. Champagne-gold serif typography, elegant thin letterforms, premium printed editorial feel. finish: champagne-gold serif typography, luxury beauty magazine, warm cinematic light. Subject: adult East Asian woman with oval face, clear skin, elegant cinematic presence. Create six completely distinct hairstyle directions adapted to her face and fashion aura: sleek bob, soft waves, high ponytail, sculpted bun, wet-look short crop, long layered fringe. Organic geometric composition with curved architectural panels, soft transitions, editorial whitespace, natural visual rhythm, not a simple collage. Warm cinematic beauty lighting, refined skin, luxury identity, high-end hair texture, glossy editorial finish. No logo, no watermark, no random replacement title, no extra random text. layout: six curved editorial panels around dominant title, organic geometry.
imagePrompts.title: Hairstyle Editorial Asian Woman Vogue Cuts

imagePrompts.prompt: Ultra-luxury cinematic hairstyle editorial poster, high-end couture beauty magazine aesthetic. The main title must read exactly "CROWN STUDY", displayed large, clear, visually dominant, like a luxury magazine masthead. Champagne-gold serif typography, elegant thin letterforms, premium printed editorial feel. finish: champagne-gold serif typography, cinematic beauty light, luxury magazine aesthetic. subject: adult Black man with deep skin tone, defined jawline, confident luxury fashion presence. hairstyle set: short waves, tapered curls, sculpted locs, clean buzz cut, high top fade, braided crown. layout: six asymmetric curved panels, dominant masthead, editorial whitespace.
